name: American Legion Park
description: American Legion Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Minden, NE. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets.

name: Jaycee Park
description: Come play pickleball at Jaycee Park in Minden, NE! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.
